runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 13 over 300m at this track behind Noaki Warrior beaten 3 lengths (16.76). Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

runners.formComment: Last start finished seventh in a Restricted WIN on March 31 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Zipping Daytona, beaten 15 lengths (26.31). Looks a solid hope.

runners.formComment: Solid performance to win by a nose at this track over 300m (16.71) beating Blue Lakoda in Grade 5 on April 6. Can make it two on the bounce.

runners.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 352m at Q Lakeside. Happy to risk this time.

runners.formComment: Solid performance to win by 6 lengths at Q Lakeside over 457m (25.21) beating Hara's Hazel in Grade 6 on March 7. Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Through the home turn was dragged down.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (19.34) in a Grade 5, finishing a 8 length sixth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and two places from nine starts. Looks a place chance at best.

runners.formComment: Could only manage eighth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when third (22.65) over 390m at Ballarat. Has a wide draw to navigate but can measure up.
